expectations.text: Recommends a specific versioning tool (Changesets, Lerna, or semantic-release)
expectations.evidence: Recommends Changesets as primary tool, explicitly mapped to skill decision tree: 'Mix of both -> Hybrid (grouped Changesets)'

expectations.text: Explains grouped/fixed versioning for coupled packages vs independent for others
expectations.evidence: Clear model: 'Independent versioning for standalone libraries' + 'Fixed version group for the coupled UI suite (@acme/ui, @acme/theme, @acme/icons)'

expectations.text: Provides Changesets config or equivalent showing package grouping

expectations.evidence: Full .github/workflows/release.yml with changesets/action, npm trusted publishing, OIDC provenance
Changesets auto-generates changelogs; also mentions .changeset/*.md format for contributor workflow
